product_updates.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
product_updates.content: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

product_updates.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
product_updates.content: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

product_updates.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
product_updates.content: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

product_updates.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
product_updates.content: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
product_updates.content: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
